developers.name: Klim K

narrativeAtSnapshot: yearn.finance launched July 17, 2020 with a completely fair launch — no pre-mine, no VC allocation, no ICO. 30,000 YFI total supply ever. Andre Cronje built it solo as a yield aggregator that automatically moves funds between Compound, Aave, and dYdX for maximum yield. YFI distributed 100% to liquidity providers. DeFi-native Twitter and Discord exploding with discussion — 5-10x mention growth week-over-week. Completely unknown outside DeFi circles. No institutional holders, no mainstream press. Community governance already active with multiple YIPs (Yearn Improvement Proposals). Structural signal: novel fair-launch mechanism, 3 elite developers, protocol already generating real yield on $100M+ TVL. Multiple DeFi blue chips seeking integrations.
